bullet_changes.original_text: Assisted in RFQ process for a $4M tooling contract; compiled bid comparisons and scored 8 suppliers against criteria matrix
bullet_changes.revised_text: Engineered a data comparison tool using Python and PostgreSQL to score suppliers against a criteria matrix, streamlining the RFQ process for a $4M tooling contract with Redis caching for performance optimization.

bullet_changes.original_text: Built an Excel/Power BI dashboard tracking on-time delivery (OTD) performance across 35 Tier 1 suppliers; OTD visibility improved from weekly reports to daily
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed a real-time dashboard using FastAPI and PostgreSQL to track on-time delivery performance across 35 Tier 1 suppliers, leveraging Celery for asynchronous data updates and improving OTD visibility from weekly to daily reports.

bullet_changes.original_text: Participated in gemba walks and kaizen events targeting finished goods warehouse throughput; documented 3 process improvement opportunities
bullet_changes.revised_text: Architected a process improvement tracking system using Git for version control and Docker for containerization, documenting 3 key opportunities for finished goods warehouse throughput enhancement and integrating with RabbitMQ for event-driven notifications.
